name: report_life_event
description: Initiate a qualifying life event process by submitting the event type and date to trigger a special enrollment window.

requiredFields.name: event_type
requiredFields.label: Event Type
requiredFields.description: The specific life event being reported.

requiredFields.name: event_date
requiredFields.label: Date of Event
requiredFields.description: The actual date the event occurred.

confirmationMessage: You are about to report a life event which will open a 31-day window to modify your benefits. Do you wish to proceed?
successMessage: Life event successfully reported. Your special enrollment window is now open until 31 days from the event date.

name: add_dependent
description: Add a new dependent to your profile for health coverage and tax purposes.

requiredFields.name: dependent_name
requiredFields.label: Full Name
requiredFields.description: Full legal name of the dependent.

confirmationMessage: You are about to add a new dependent. You will be required to upload supporting documentation (birth certificate, marriage license) in the next step.
successMessage: Dependent successfully added to your profile. Please ensure you also update your benefit elections to include them in coverage.

name: update_tax_withholding
description: Modify federal and state tax withholding status and allowances following a life event change.

requiredFields.name: claim_dependents_amount
requiredFields.label: Total Dependent Credit Amount
requiredFields.description: Total dollar amount for child/dependent credits (e.g., $2000 per child).

confirmationMessage: You are about to update your W-4 tax withholding information. This will affect your take-home pay on the next available pay cycle.
successMessage: Tax withholding information updated successfully. Changes will be reflected starting from the next pay period.

name: update_beneficiary
description: Update primary or contingent beneficiaries for life insurance and retirement plans.

requiredFields.name: plan_type
requiredFields.label: Benefit Plan
requiredFields.description: The plan you wish to update beneficiaries for.

requiredFields.name: beneficiary_name
requiredFields.label: Beneficiary Name
requiredFields.description: Full name of the individual or entity.

requiredFields.name: allocation_percentage
requiredFields.label: Allocation %
requiredFields.description: Percentage of benefit (must total 100% for all primary beneficiaries).

confirmationMessage: You are about to update your legal beneficiaries. Note: Spousal consent may be required if naming a non-spouse as primary for retirement plans.
successMessage: Beneficiary designation updated. Your records have been adjusted for the selected plan.

name: update_address
description: Update your residential address which may trigger tax state changes or health plan network adjustments.
confirmationMessage: Changing your address to a different state may affect your tax withholding and health plan eligibility. Are you sure you want to update your primary residence?
successMessage: Address updated successfully. We are now recalculating your state tax requirements and plan network eligibility.

name: modify_fsa_election
description: Adjust your Flexible Spending Account (Healthcare or Dependent Care) contribution amounts due to a qualifying life event.

requiredFields.name: fsa_type
requiredFields.label: FSA Type
requiredFields.description: Which account you want to adjust.

requiredFields.name: new_annual_contribution
requiredFields.label: New Annual Contribution
requiredFields.description: The total amount you want to contribute for the remainder of the year.

confirmationMessage: You are about to change your FSA election. Changes must be consistent with the life event reported (e.g., increasing Dependent Care FSA after a birth).
successMessage: FSA election modified. Your per-paycheck deduction will be adjusted automatically for the remainder of the plan year.
